    Classes in global.thalion.ttio that implement Run
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AcquisitionRun
    An ordered collection of spectra from one acquisition, with instrument config, spectrum index, and optional chromatograms.
    Methods in global.thalion.ttio that return types with arguments of type Run
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<String,Run>
    SpectralDataset.runs()
    Phase 2: canonical mapping over every run in the file (MS + genomic), keyed by run name.
    Map<String,Run>
    SpectralDataset.runsForSample(String sampleUri)
    Phase 1 (post-M91): every run associated with sampleUri.
    Map<String,Run>
    SpectralDataset.runsOfModality(Class<? extends Run> runType)
    Phase 1 (post-M91): every run whose value is an instance of runType.
    Method parameters in global.thalion.ttio with type arguments of type Run
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<String,Run>
    SpectralDataset.runsOfModality(Class<? extends Run> runType)
